title: helichrysum thapsus
intro: Helichrysum thapsus, also known as the annual curry plant or annual helichrysum, is an annual herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the daisy family. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum thapsus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb for various health applications.
